reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for the two consumer adoption guide claims covered by the external consumer smoke and behavior-intent vocabulary tests.

claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep consumer adoption guidance aligned with doctor first_bounded_run payload fields and smoke coverage.

claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep consumer adoption deprecated-surface guidance aligned with behavior-intent catalog tests when surface names change.
